task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL in the format 's3://bucket-name.region.amazonaws.com'. The function should return just the region code (e.g., 'us-east-1').
Create a JSON object representing an AWS IAM policy that allows a principal to perform GetObject and PutObject actions on all objects within a specific S3 bucket named 'my-app-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs. Instance IDs follow the pattern of 'i-' followed by exactly 17 alphanumeric characters (lowercase letters and digits only).
